title: 17岁解锁iPhone，18年后挑战英伟达，AMD主动送芯片
description: 一家价值万亿美元的芯片公司自愿向 17 岁解锁 iPhone 的黑客 George Hotz 发送两张顶级 AI 加速卡。
titleZh: 17岁解锁iPhone，18年后挑战英伟达，AMD主动送芯片
titleEn: Unlocked an iPhone at 17, challenges Nvidia 18 years later, AMD sends chips voluntarily
descriptionZh: 一家价值万亿美元的芯片公司自愿向 17 岁解锁 iPhone 的黑客 George Hotz 发送两张顶级 AI 加速卡。
descriptionEn: A trillion-dollar chip company voluntarily sends two top-tier AI accelerator cards to a hacker who unlocked an iPhone at 17: George Hotz. Hotz aims to tear down Nvidia's CUDA moat with 20,000 lines of code. His judgment is simple: what sets Nvidia apart from its rivals is not the chips, but the software complexity built up over a decade—and this moat might not be that thick.
